signature.instructions:
True iff the paper is a literature survey or review: it organizes and summarizes prior work in a subfield without proposing a new method or running new empirical evaluations as its main contribution. Typical titles: 'A Survey of...', 'A Review of...', 'A Comprehensive Survey on...'. False for empirical method papers, benchmark-introducing papers, position/perspective papers, and 'Towards understanding...' analyses.

Field descriptions: `title`: Paper title; `abstract`: Paper abstract
